overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a journey through heavy rain. The vehicle travels from concrete overpasses and winding mountain roads through a tunnel, emerging into an urban highway illuminated by vibrant neon signs and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass and winding mountain road

events.description: exits covered concrete overpass into open rainy highway
navigates sharp right curve on wet winding road

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle through a concrete overpass and onto a winding mountain highway in heavy rain

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure with multiple arches spanning the highway
metal guardrails with integrated orange lights along the road edge
steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation alongside the highway
large advertising billboard visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass structure with the vehicle driving on a wet multi-lane highway. Exiting the sheltered area into heavy rain, the road winds through rocky hillsides with illuminated guardrails. A billboard is visible on the right as the vehicle navigates the curving mountain road.

events.description: enters concrete tunnel from rainy outdoor highway
exits tunnel back into heavy rain and open air

agents.ego_description: driving through a well-lit concrete tunnel with smooth walls and ceiling lights

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls and ceiling with evenly spaced artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters a concrete highway tunnel, transitioning from natural rainy light to artificial illumination. The tunnel features smooth concrete walls and ceiling-mounted lights. After driving through the enclosed space, the vehicle exits back into the rainy outdoor environment.

events.description: distant neon-lit skyscrapers become visible through the rain

agents.ego_description: driving on wet highway through vegetated area with trees and bushes lining the road, approaching urban neon district

entered.detail: dense trees and vegetation lining the left side of the highway
tall buildings with glowing neon lights visible in the distance through the rain

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle continues on a rain-soaked highway flanked by dense vegetation and trees. As the road progresses, the silhouette of a futuristic urban skyline with glowing neon towers emerges through the hazy rain, signaling the approach to the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban neon-lit highway with commercial signage

events.description: encounters moderate traffic with multiple vehicles on the wet highway
blue sports car overtakes on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving through a busy urban highway illuminated by bright neon signs and digital billboards, navigating through moderate traffic in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking the ego vehicle on the left
vehicle ahead driving in the same direction with brake lights visible

entered.detail: bright pink and blue neon signs including 'YARVA' signage on buildings
large illuminated advertising screens displaying commercial content
multi-story commercial buildings lining the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a densely urbanized area with bright neon signs and digital billboards illuminating the rainy night. The highway becomes busier with moderate traffic, including a blue sports car that overtakes on the left. Multi-story buildings with glowing advertisements line both sides of the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a desolate, rainy mountain pass into a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins under a massive concrete overpass on a wet highway, moving out into heavy rain as the road winds through rocky hillsides past illuminated guardrails and a solitary billboard. The camera then glides into a concrete highway tunnel, shifting from the natural gloom of the storm to artificial overhead lighting before emerging back into the rainy outdoors. As the vehicle continues past dense vegetation, the hazy silhouette of a glowing urban skyline gradually reveals itself through the rain. The scene finally opens into a densely urbanized corridor of multi-story buildings and digital billboards, where the vehicle navigates moderate traffic and is overtaken by a blue sports car under the glare of vivid neon signs.
